holidays.name: Magha Puja
holidays.description: Commemorates the gathering of 1,250 arahants before the Buddha. Observed on the full moon of Magha.

holidays.name: Vesak (Buddha Purnima)
holidays.description: Birth, enlightenment, and parinirvana of the Buddha. The most sacred day in the Buddhist calendar.

holidays.name: Asalha Puja (Dhamma Day)
holidays.description: Marks the Buddha's first sermon and the beginning of the Sangha.

holidays.name: Kathina
holidays.description: Robes offering ceremony at the end of the rains retreat (Vassa).

holidays.name: Visakha Bucha
holidays.description: Thailand's Vesak observance — temple visits, candle processions, and merit-making.

holidays.name: Vesak Full Moon Poya
holidays.description: Sri Lankan Vesak — lanterns, dansals, and sil observances.

holidays.name: Kason Full Moon
holidays.description: Myanmar Vesak — Bodhi tree watering ceremonies and pagoda visits.
